description: Composition Brown round neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, with fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short sleeve with print on the chest combined with embroidery Fitting Muscle Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery In times when friends are only made online, nature is limited to screen savers, Play Stations are the new sport fields, goons take up moral policing, the world has become self-contradictory, cut through the noise. Believe in your identity, stick to your basics, be yourself. Pair this t-shirt with denims and simple sneakers for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
